children.label: A
children.text: the stated redemption price at maturity, over

children.heading: Stated redemption price at maturity
children.label: 2 Stated redemption price at maturity
children.text: The term “stated redemption price at maturity” means the amount fixed by the last modification of the purchase agreement and includes interest and other amounts payable at that time (other than any interest based on a fixed rate, and payable unconditionally at fixed periodic intervals of 1 year or less during the entire term of the debt instrument).

children.heading: ¼ of 1 percent de minimis rule
children.label: 3 ¼ of 1 percent de minimis rule
A
children.text: ¼ of 1 percent of the stated redemption price at maturity, multiplied by

children.label: B
children.text: the number of complete years to maturity,

children.heading: Publicly offered debt instruments not issued for property
children.label: 1 Publicly offered debt instruments not issued for property

children.heading: Other debt instruments not issued for property
children.label: 2 Other debt instruments not issued for property
children.text: In the case of any issue of debt instruments not issued for property and not publicly offered, the issue price of each such instrument is the price paid by the first buyer of such debt instrument.

children.heading: Debt instruments issued for property where there is public trading
children.label: 3 Debt instruments issued for property where there is public trading
A
children.text: is part of an issue a portion of which is traded on an established securities market, or

children.label: i
children.text: is issued for stock or securities which are traded on an established securities market, or

children.label: ii
children.text: to the extent provided in regulations, is issued for property (other than stock or securities) of a kind regularly traded on an established market,

children.label: A
children.text: to which paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of this subsection applies, or

children.heading: Property
children.label: 5 Property
children.text: In applying this subsection, the term “property” includes services and the right to use property, but such term does not include money.

children.heading: Special rules for applying subsection (b)
children.label: c Special rules for applying subsection (b)

children.heading: Initial offering price; price paid by the first buyer
children.label: 1 Initial offering price; price paid by the first buyer
children.text: The terms “initial offering price” and “price paid by the first buyer” include the aggregate payments made by the purchaser under the purchase agreement, including modifications thereof.

children.label: A
children.text: the issue price for such unit shall be determined in accordance with the rules of this subsection and subsection (b) as if it were a debt instrument,

children.label: B
children.text: the issue price determined for such unit shall be allocated to each element of such unit on the basis of the relationship of the fair market value of such element to the fair market value of all elements in such unit, and

children.label: C
children.text: the issue price of any debt instrument included in such unit shall be the portion of the issue price of the unit allocated to the debt instrument under subparagraph (B).
